heading: Tuesday Night
text: Showers, with pockets of freezing rain possible far north.
temperature: Mid 40s to mid 50s south, mainly mid 30s to mid 40s north

heading: Wednesday
text: Chance of early showers, or patchy freezing rain far north; then chance of sprinkles or drizzle.
temperature: 40s to around 50 north, 50s to around 60 south

heading: Thursday
text: Periods of rain or wintry mix.
